tooltip.dk: Denne kategori er et eksempel, hvor man kan se brugen flere niveauer og kommentarer. Kategorien fjernes, når formularen er live. Bemærk, at det også er muligt at indsætte en kommentar som denne på de øvrige kategorier i dropdownen.
tooltip.en: This category is an example, where you can see the use of multiple levels and comments. The category is removed once the form is live. Note that it is also possible to insert a comment like this on the other categories in the dropdown.

searchStringComment.dk: Dette er et eksempel på et underemne på niveau 1.

tooltip.dk: Dette er et eksempel på et underemne på niveau 1.

searchStringComment.en: This is an example of a subtopic at level 1, that has subtopics underneath (indicated with an arrow). Click to see the subtopics.

searchStringComment.dk: Dette er et eksempel på, at de tre valgmuligheder 'Smal', 'Normal' og 'Bred' ikke vises i avanceret søgning.
searchStringComment.en: This is an example of, that the three options 'Narrow', 'Standard' and 'Broad' are not shown in advanced search.

tooltip.dk: Dette er et eksempel på, at de tre valgmuligheder 'Smal', 'Normal' og 'Bred' ikke vises i avanceret søgning.
tooltip.en: This is an example of, that the three options 'Narrow', 'Standard' and 'Broad' are not shown in advanced search.

normal: ("Cognition disorders"[mh] OR cogniti* disorder*[ti] OR cogniti* impairment*[ti])
broad: ("Cognition disorders"[mh] OR cogniti* disorder*[tiab] OR cogniti* impairment*[tiab])

normal: ("Demyelinating Autoimmune Diseases, CNS"[mh] OR demyelinating autoimmune*[ti])
broad: ("Demyelinating Autoimmune Diseases, CNS"[mh] OR demyelinating autoimmune*[tiab])

normal: (("Autonomic Nervous System"[mh] OR "Autonomic Nervous System Diseases"[mh]) AND ("Diabetic Neuropathies"[mh] OR neuropath*[ti])) OR autonomic neuropath*[ti]
broad: (("Autonomic Nervous System"[mh] OR "Autonomic Nervous System Diseases"[mh]) AND ("Diabetic Neuropathies"[mh] OR neuropath*[tiab])) OR autonomic neuropath*[tiab]

normal: ("Peripheral Nervous System Diseases"[mh] AND ("Diabetic Neuropathies"[mh] OR neuropath*[ti])) OR peripheral neuropath*[ti]
broad: ("Peripheral Nervous System Diseases"[mh] AND ("Diabetic Neuropathies"[mh] OR neuropath*[tiab])) OR peripheral neuropath*[tiab]

normal: ("Diabetic Retinopathy"[mh] OR "Optic Neuropathy, Ischemic"[mh] OR retinopathy*[ti])
broad: ("Diabetic Retinopathy"[mh] OR "Optic Neuropathy, Ischemic"[mh] OR retinopathy*[tiab])

normal: ("Diabetic Neuropathies"[mh] OR "Polyneuropathies"[mh] OR neuropath*[ti] OR polyneuropath*[ti])
broad: ("Diabetic Neuropathies"[mh] OR "Polyneuropathies"[mh] OR neuropath*[tiab] OR polyneuropath*[tiab])

normal: ("Sleep Disorders, Circadian Rhythm"[mh] OR "Sleep Apnea Syndromes"[mh] OR circadian*[ti])
broad: ("Sleep Disorders, Circadian Rhythm"[mh] OR "Sleep Apnea Syndromes"[mh] OR circadian*[tiab])

normal: ("Insulin Resistance"[mh] OR insulin resistance[ti]) AND ("Brain"[mh] OR brain[ti])
broad: ("Insulin Resistance"[mh] OR insulin resistance[tiab]) AND ("Brain"[mh] OR brain[tiab])

normal: "Diabetes Mellitus, Type 1"[mh] OR ((type-1[ti] OR type-i[ti] OR dm1[ti] OR dmi[ti] OR t1d[ti] OR iddm[ti] OR insulin-dependent[ti] OR insulindependent[ti] OR juvenile-onset[ti] OR autoimmune[ti]) AND ("Diabetes Mellitus"[mh] OR diabet*[ti]))
broad: "Diabetes Mellitus, Type 1"[mh] OR ((type-1[tiab] OR type-i[tiab] OR dm1[tiab] OR dmi[tiab] OR t1d[tiab] OR iddm[tiab] OR insulin-dependent[tiab] OR insulindependent[tiab] OR juvenile-onset[tiab] OR autoimmune[tiab]) AND ("Diabetes Mellitus"[mh] OR diabet*[tiab]))

normal: "Diabetes Mellitus, Type 2"[mh] OR ((type-2[ti] OR type-ii[ti] OR dm2[ti] OR t2d[ti] OR niddm[ti] OR noninsulin-dependent[ti] OR non-insulin-dependent[ti] OR noninsulindependent[ti] OR adult-onset[ti]) AND ("Diabetes Mellitus"[mh] OR diabet*[ti]))
broad: "Diabetes Mellitus, Type 2"[mh] OR ((type-2[tiab] OR type-ii[tiab] OR dm2[tiab] OR dmii[tiab] OR t2d[tiab] OR niddm[tiab] OR noninsulin-dependent[tiab] OR non-insulin-dependent[tiab] OR noninsulindependent[tiab] OR adult-onset[tiab]) AND ("Diabetes Mellitus"[mh] OR diabet*[tiab]))

searchStringComment.dk: dmii[ti] er ikke medtaget i den normale version, da der ikke findes nogen referencer i PubMed, hvor 'dmii' indgår i titlen.

normal: ("Glucose Clamp Technique"[mh] OR glucose clamp technique*[ti])
broad: ("Glucose Clamp Technique"[mh] OR glucose clamp technique*[tiab])

normal: ("Glucose Tolerance Test"[mh] OR glucose tolerance test*[ti])
broad: ("Glucose Tolerance Test"[mh] OR glucose tolerance test*[tiab])

normal: ("Magnetic Resonance Imaging"[mh] OR magnetic resonance imaging*[ti])
broad: ("Magnetic Resonance Imaging"[mh] OR magnetic resonance imaging*[tiab])
